name: =?utf-8?Q?Bobby=20Jindal?=
subject: LSU Wins
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jindal For President
body:
|
---
| | Wow, what a win under the lights at Tiger Stadium!

Celebrate the Tigers' 7 point win [by making a special $7 donation to our campaign today.](http://bobbyjindal.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3b861e295816e1c57ea4552ed&id=45f2f0b4cc&e=724c64cfa7)

I was home for the game, but am headed back to Iowa this week to hit the campaign trail again.

Have a great rest of your weekend,

Bobby

[](http://bobbyjindal.us11.list-manage1.com/track/click?u=3b861e295816e1c57ea4552ed&id=71e64bff9c&e=724c64cfa7)

---
| | | Paid for by Jindal For President
---
|
---
| _Copyright © 2015 JINDAL FOR PRESIDENT, All rights reserved._
You are receiving this email as a supporter of Bobby Jindal

**Our mailing address is:**
JINDAL FOR PRESIDENTP.O. BOX 5101BATON ROUGE, LA 70821
[Add us to your address book](http://bobbyjindal.us11.list-manage.com/vcard?u=3b861e295816e1c57ea4552ed&id=36e884e022)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](http://bobbyjindal.us11.list-manage.com/profile?u=3b861e295816e1c57ea4552ed&id=36e884e022&e=724c64cfa7) or [unsubscribe from this list](http://bobbyjindal.us11.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=3b861e295816e1c57ea4552ed&id=36e884e022&e=724c64cfa7&c=0e10c83724)

name: Hillary Clinton
subject: Will I see you at my birthday party?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
body:
RSVP before midnight for my birthday? | Friend --

I may not be the best dancer you’ve ever seen, but when I get out there, you know I’m having a good time. I have a feeling my birthday party this year will be that kind of night: great people coming together to enjoy good food, live music (from John Legend!), and wonderful company.

I’m thrilled the campaign is flying a supporter to the party to be my VIP guest. It just wouldn’t be the same without someone from this team standing by my side -- the same way you always do, day in and day out.

**Tonight at midnight is the deadline to enter to win your free trip. Don’t miss out!** | [ | [**Add my name**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MjM3NzM2OTUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYxNzY2MzM5S0&mt=1&rt=0)
--- ](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MjM3NzM2OTUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYxNzY2MzM5S0&mt=1&rt=0)

See you on the dance floor,

Hillary

**No purchase, payment, or contribution is necessary to win, and will not improve chances of winning.** Void where prohibited. Entries must be received between 10/14/15 and 10/18/15. Enter by contributing [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=29&ms=MjM3NzM2OTUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYxNzY2MzM5S0&mt=1&rt=0) or [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=MjM3NzM2OTUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYxNzY2MzM5S0&mt=1&rt=0) to enter without contributing. Two (2) winners and a guest will receive one (1) invitation to attend Hillary’s Birthday Party, round-trip airline tickets from within the fifty U.S. States, DC, or Puerto Rico to New York and one (1) night hotel accommodation (approximate retail value of Prizes: $2,080). Odds of winning depend on number of entries received. Promotion open only to U.S. citizens or residents of the 50 states, DC or Puerto Rico and 18 or older (or age of majority under applicable law). All prizes awarded. Promotion subject to [Official Rules](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MjM3NzM2OTUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYxNzY2MzM5S0&mt=1&rt=0) and additional restrictions on eligibility. Sponsor: Hillary for America 300 Cadman Plaza W, Brooklyn, NY 11201. | PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
---
Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This is your campaign, so if you have thoughts on anything at all, just [click here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=28&ms=MjM3NzM2OTUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYxNzY2MzM5S0&mt=1&rt=0) to send us a message! Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MjM3NzM2OTUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYxNzY2MzM5S0&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the campaign on [Facebook](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjM3NzM2OTUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYxNzY2MzM5S0&mt=1&rt=0), [Twitter](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjM3NzM2OTUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYxNzY2MzM5S0&mt=1&rt=0), and [Instagram](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=23&ms=MjM3NzM2OTUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYxNzY2MzM5S0&mt=1&rt=0). Thanks so much for doing everything you can to elect Hillary Clinton as our next president.
Hillary for America, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185
[Privacy Policy](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=20&ms=MjM3NzM2OTUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYxNzY2MzM5S0&mt=1&rt=0)

name: Rand Paul
subject: Can I count on you, Fellow Conservative?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Fellow Conservative,

The deadline to reach our $200,000 goal is Tuesday at midnight -- just over 48 hours away.

_And according to our records, I haven't received your contribution yet_.

**Fellow Conservative
[ dpwillis67@gmail.com ](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31083381:WHgBLqmaN:m:1:879035888:DA5FC31F000F82985747C59FE478FB9A:r)
DONATION STATUS: ## MISSING## **
That's why I'm emailing you again to remind you how important my TV and Radio Ad Blitz in Iowa is.

Even despite the media's blackout of my campaign, the upcoming presidential debate gives us a chance to break through.

My campaign staff is finishing up a detailed plan with carefully targeted TV and radio ads to reach as many as possible voters in Iowa during and after the next Republican presidential debate.

I'm confident this TV and Radio Ad Blitz in Iowa is just what we need to surge to the top of the polls.

_But in order to maximize the effectiveness of this plan, we need to raise $200,000 before Tuesday, October 20th_.

That's why I must be able to count on your immediate support before time runs out.

Every dollar is critical, Fellow Conservative. Any amount you can afford to give right now will help my campaign tremendously.

**[So please make your most generous contribution right away](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31083381:WHgBLqmaN:m:1:879035888:DA5FC31F000F82985747C59FE478FB9A:r)**.

And remember -- the more you give, the more we can do.

Thank you for your generous and continued support.

| | [Chip in $10 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31083382:WHgBLqmaN:m:1:879035888:DA5FC31F000F82985747C59FE478FB9A:r)
---
[Chip in $25 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31083383:WHgBLqmaN:m:1:879035888:DA5FC31F000F82985747C59FE478FB9A:r)
[Chip in $50 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31083384:WHgBLqmaN:m:1:879035888:DA5FC31F000F82985747C59FE478FB9A:r)
[Chip in $100 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31083385:WHgBLqmaN:m:1:879035888:DA5FC31F000F82985747C59FE478FB9A:r)
[Or donate another amount >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31083381:WHgBLqmaN:m:1:879035888:DA5FC31F000F82985747C59FE478FB9A:r)

In Liberty,

Rand Paul

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31083381:WHgBLqmaN:m:1:879035888:DA5FC31F000F82985747C59FE478FB9A:r)

name: George P. Bush
subject: Ticket for Friend
body:
I'll keep this short, Friend.

You still haven't entered to win a free trip to Houston to meet: My grandparents, President George H.W. Bush and Barbara Bush; my uncle, President George W. Bush; and my parents.

So I thought I would sweeten the deal even more.

[**For 24 hours only, every entry will be doubled. Friend, if you chip in $1 right now, we 'll match your entry, giving you twice as many chances to win.**](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/nwkhgtkmjpdnwbwqntzhjncbkkncmbgmhtrtdmbyftjd_dmdccsjg.html?a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)

Hurry though, you only have 24 hours to take advantage of this deal: [**Jeb2016.com/Houston-Sweepstakes-Donate/**](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/uymbvgckmfnsyjyhsgdbmszjccszkjvkbgpgnkjqwgmf_dmdccsjg.html?a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)

[](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/xgjlkpcqsbrtgygdtpmlstnycctnqykqlpjprqyvhpsj_dmdccsjg.html?a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)

**We 're not joking when we say this type of contest won't come along for awhile, so you don't want to miss out on meeting my grandparents, President George H.W. and Barbara Bush; my uncle, President George W. Bush; and my dad, Jeb.**

Friend, get your 2-for-1 entry to win a free trip to Houston now: **[Jeb2016.com/Houston-Sweepstakes-Donate/](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/qnfqyvdrhfgtncnmtvbqhtjcddtjrcyrqvpvgrcwsvhh_dmdccsjg.html?a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)**

See you there,

George P. Bush

[](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/chcrvgmzqlcfhshtfgnrqfksmmfkzsvzrgjgczsdpgqm_dmdccsjg.html?a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)
Paid for by Jeb 2016, Inc.
Jeb 2016, Inc. PO Box 440641 Miami, FL 33144
[Unsubscribe](http://www.email.jeb2016.com/Unsub.do?a=u&e=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&mid=4725&sid=DB49C865-0E01-4FD8-AE99-ACEBCD4745CE&rid=55890&lid=18)
[You can read the full sweepstakes rules here](https://jeb2016.com/houston-sweepstakes-rules/). Alternatively, you may enter without contributing by [clicking here](https://jeb2016.com/houston-sweepstakes/). **NO PURCHASE NECESSARY TO ENTER OR WIN A PRIZE.** No contribution or payment of any kind is necessary to enter or win this Promotion. Making a contribution does not increase your chances of winning. To enter by making a contribution, [click here](https://jeb2016.com/houston-sweepstakes-donate/). To enter without making a contribution, [click here](https://jeb2016.com/houston-sweepstakes/). Void in Florida and where prohibited. The Promotion begins on Saturday, October 3, 2015 at 12:00 am Eastern Daylight Time and ends on Friday, October 23, 2015 at 11:59 pm Eastern Daylight Time. All entries must be received by 11:59 pm Eastern Daylight Time on Friday, October 23, 2015. One winner will receive the following Prize: two (2) round-trip coach class plane tickets in the continental United States on a date and to and from Destinations to be determined by Sponsor, with an approximate retail value of $1,500; one (1) one-night hotel stay at one of the area hotels, with an approximate retail value of $175; two (2) tickets to attend the Q3 Mission Complete Celebration, with an approximate retail value of $0; and ground transportation at the discretion of Sponsor, with an approximate retail value of $50. Approximate total retail value is $1,725. Odds of winning depend on the number of entries received. The Promotion is open to citizens and permanent residents (green card holders) of the United States who are legal residents of one of the fifty states, Puerto Rico, or the District of Columbia and are at least 18 years of age or the age of majority as determined by state law. Details and qualifications for participation in this Promotion may apply. Restrictions are listed in the [Official Rules](https://jeb2016.com/houston-sweepstakes-rules/). The Sponsor is Jeb 2016, Inc. The Sponsor's address is PO Box 440641 Miami, FL 33144.

Bush; and my parents. So I thought I would sweeten the deal even more. Hurry though, you only have 24 hours to take advantage of this deal: We 're not joking when we say this type of contest won't come along for awhile, so you don't want to miss out on meeting my grandparents, President George H.W. and Barbara Bush; my uncle, President George W. Bush; and my dad, Jeb. Friend, get your 2-for-1 entry to win a free trip to Houston now: See you there, George P. Bush Paid for by Jeb 2016, Inc. Jeb 2016, Inc. PO Box 440641 Miami, FL 33144 . Alternatively, you may enter without contributing by . NO PURCHASE NECESSARY TO ENTER OR WIN A PRIZE. No contribution or payment of any kind is necessary to enter or win this Promotion. Making a contribution does not increase your chances of winning. To enter by making a contribution, . To enter without making a contribution, . Void in Florida and where prohibited. The Promotion begins on Saturday, October 3, 2015 at 12:00 am Eastern Daylight Time and ends on Friday, October 23, 2015 at 11:59 pm Eastern Daylight Time. All entries must be received by 11:59 pm Eastern Daylight Time on Friday, October 23, 2015. One winner will receive the following Prize: two (2) round-trip coach class plane tickets in the continental United States on a date and to and from Destinations to be determined by Sponsor, with an approximate retail value of $1,500; one (1) one-night hotel stay at one of the area hotels, with an approximate retail value of $175; two (2) tickets to attend the Q3 Mission Complete Celebration, with an approximate retail value of $0; and ground transportation at the discretion of Sponsor, with an approximate retail value of $50. Approximate total retail value is $1,725. Odds of winning depend on the number of entries received. The Promotion is open to citizens and permanent residents (green card holders) of the United States who are legal residents of one of the fifty states, Puerto Rico, or the District of Columbia and are at least 18 years of age or the age of majority as determined by state law. Details and qualifications for participation in this Promotion may apply. Restrictions are listed in the . The Sponsor is Jeb 2016, Inc. The Sponsor's address is PO Box 440641 Miami, FL 33144.

name: Lindsey Kolb
subject: A great week on the road
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GREITENS FOR MISSOURI
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/44482211:JzcIjlLvN:m:1:1652969985:FA2E552EFBF91FAF4675C94E7C6A9C70:r)
Peter,
Team Greitens has had a fantastic week on the campaign trail. I wanted to share with you some highlights from this last week:
**Fundraising Wins:**
This week Quarter Three fundraising reports were released. Eric now leads every Republican contender in the Missouri Governor's race in fundraising. With $1.4 Million raised and $2.3 million cash on hand, our Quarter Three fundraising report showed significant strengths as compared to any Republican candidate for governor.
Nearly 7 out of every 10 donations came from Missouri companies and individuals in Quarter Three. This shows a strong base of support from Missouri voters. We want to thank each and every one of you who has invested to help us make this campaign a success.
**Defense of Liberty Dinner:**
On Friday night Eric spoke at the annual Paul Curtman Defense of Liberty Dinner. Eric was able to share his mission for Missouri with hundreds of attendees. Our team had a great time meeting with new supporters and signing new people up to be a members of Team Greitens.
**T-shirts for Sale:**
We still have some of our limited edition Day One t-shirts for sale! [**Click here to order one and we'll deliver it to your door!**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/44482212:JzcIjlLvN:m:1:1652969985:FA2E552EFBF91FAF4675C94E7C6A9C70:r)
**[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/44482212:JzcIjlLvN:m:1:1652969985:FA2E552EFBF91FAF4675C94E7C6A9C70:r)**
**Positive Press:**
Steve Kraske, a reporter from the Kansas City Star, had a great write up on Charlie Mike, the new book by Joe Klein being released this Tuesday. The book chronicles Eric's success starting The Mission Continues and more.
Here's a quick excerpt from Kraske's article: "The book chronicles Greitens' path to starting this worthy organization and the success it's had. And it does something more too -- it's a testament to Greitens' character, resolve, tenacity and toughness. His all-American goodness just oozes forth on page after page. All those traits, by the way, just might serve a new governor well." [Click here to read the full article. ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/44482213:JzcIjlLvN:m:1:1652969985:FA2E552EFBF91FAF4675C94E7C6A9C70:r)
As you can tell, the momentum behind Eric's mission for Missouri is growing and we are excited to share this mission for Missouri with each of you. We look forward to sending you more updates from the campaign trail. We are honored to have you on the team.
Best,
Lindsey Kolb
Greitens for Governor
PAID FOR BY GREITENS FOR MISSOURI
JEFF STUERMAN, TREASURER

name: Justin Amash
subject: Stand up for the ENTIRE Bill of Rights
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Friend of Liberty,

During the last Republican presidential debate, I saw something remarkable on stage.

I saw one man stand up for the Bill of Rights. All of it.

I saw one man announce that if you want another war in Iraq, there are 14 other candidates to choose from, and there will always be another Bush or Clinton.

I saw one man stand up for the Tenth Amendment and a rational drug policy, taking on three drug warriors by himself.

It shouldn't surprise you that this one man is Dr. Rand Paul. I couldn't have been more proud of him. I hope you feel the same way.

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31084423:WtCG1qmNI:m:1:879035888:8515C41231D6129F7219755CA6D7F055:r)

And if you do, **[I hope you will join me in helping him reach his $200,000 goal before Tuesday's deadline and fuel his TV and Radio Ad Blitz in Iowa during and after the next presidential debate](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31084423:WtCG1qmNI:m:1:879035888:8515C41231D6129F7219755CA6D7F055:r)**.

Whether it's defending your rights against drones, the Patriot Act, or indefinite detention, Rand stands up every time.

I urge you to **[stand with him](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31084423:WtCG1qmNI:m:1:879035888:8515C41231D6129F7219755CA6D7F055:r)** today.

**Fellow Conservative
[ dpwillis67@gmail.com ](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31084423:WtCG1qmNI:m:1:879035888:8515C41231D6129F7219755CA6D7F055:r)

---
[Chip in $25 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31084425:WtCG1qmNI:m:1:879035888:8515C41231D6129F7219755CA6D7F055:r)
[Chip in $50 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31084426:WtCG1qmNI:m:1:879035888:8515C41231D6129F7219755CA6D7F055:r)
[Chip in $100 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31084427:WtCG1qmNI:m:1:879035888:8515C41231D6129F7219755CA6D7F055:r)
[Or donate another amount >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31084423:WtCG1qmNI:m:1:879035888:8515C41231D6129F7219755CA6D7F055:r)

For Liberty,

Justin Amash

body:

**No purchase, payment, or contribution is necessary to win, and will not improve chances of winning.** Void where prohibited. Entries must be received between 10/14/15 and 10/18/15. Two (2) winners and a guest will receive one (1) invitation to attend Hillary's Birthday Party, round-trip airline tickets from within the fifty U.S. States, DC, or Puerto Rico to New York and one (1) night hotel accommodation (approximate retail value of Prizes: $2,080). Odds of winning depend on number of entries received. Promotion open only to U.S. citizens or residents of the 50 states, DC or Puerto Rico and 18 or older (or age of majority under applicable law). All prizes awarded. Promotion subject to [Official Rules](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MjM3NzY1NDcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYxODc4OTAwS0&mt=1&rt=0) and additional restrictions on eligibility. Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This is your campaign, so if you have thoughts on anything at all, just [click here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=21&ms=MjM3NzY1NDcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYxODc4OTAwS0&mt=1&rt=0) to send us a message! Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjM3NzY1NDcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYxODc4OTAwS0&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the campaign on [Facebook](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MjM3NzY1NDcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYxODc4OTAwS0&mt=1&rt=0), [Twitter](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MjM3NzY1NDcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYxODc4OTAwS0&mt=1&rt=0), and [Instagram](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=16&ms=MjM3NzY1NDcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYxODc4OTAwS0&mt=1&rt=0). Thanks so much for doing everything you can to elect Hillary Clinton as our next president.
Hillary for America, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185
